currentDocsTruth.originalSystemMapping: The original-system crosswalk is a rebuild mapping companion. Source names are candidate owners; retail binary/save/runtime proof remains higher authority for behavior. currentDocsTruth.ayaResourceTags: The AYA resource tag-family static contract is a source/static planning contract for LVLR, WRES, ERES, LNDS, PAGE, GDIE, MESH, and TEXT. It is loader-contract vocabulary only, not corpus proof, runtime parser proof, extractor/importer execution, generated asset output, renderer proof, or rebuild parity.
currentDocsTruth.renderResourceBridge: The render-resource bridge static contract is a source/static planning contract for routing MESH and TEXT from the AYA loader vocabulary into existing renderer/material/mesh/texture static docs. It uses Tier C source engine architecture plus Tier B retail/static renderer and texture decode docs only; it is not runtime parser proof, runtime texture decode proof, GPU upload proof, texture pixel proof, runtime mesh-loading proof, animation/skinning proof, collision proof, material appearance proof, shader behavior proof, visual output proof, renderer behavior proof, generated asset output, product exposure, or rebuild parity.
